name: Barbecued Meat Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine 1/2 cup ketchup, 1/4 cup water, and 1 tablespoon lemon juice.
2. In another small bowl, mix 1 tablespoon brown sugar, 1 tablespoon Worcestershire sauce, and 1 dash of hot pepper sauce with a splash of water.
3. Stir both mixtures together until well blended. Add a dash of salt and black pepper to taste.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground meat, egg, and finely chopped onion.
5. Mix in the chopped green pepper, soy sauce, ketchup, half-and-half, and cornstarch with the meat mixture until fully combined.
6. Form the mixture into even, slightly thick meat patties.
7. Place the patties on a preheated barbecue grill.
8. Broil 3 to 4 inches from the heat source for 12-15 minutes total or until cooked to your desired doneness. Flip and baste with sauce occasionally for even cooking.
9. Serve the meat patties on hamburger buns, if desired, or alongside French fries. The remaining sauce can be served as a side dish. Makes 4 servings.
